flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwestern University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.8k → $68.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwestern University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.8k → $68.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwestern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northwestern University are 52% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($89.4k vs $58.7k).
